---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug
labels: bug
---

## Bug Description
Describe the problem clearly.

## Steps to Reproduce
Please try to reproduce the problem using a [Demo config](https://github.com/arne314/typstar#demo).

## Environment
- Neovim version: [e.g. 0.11.6]
- Plugin packaging: [e.g. Nix or Lazy]
- OS: [e.g. NixOS 25.11 or Fedora 43]
